languages.text: "А здесь чего?! Лиану жевать и за жизнь свою трястись?! Я лучше подохну во славу Бога-Императора среди звезд!"
"And what is there for us here? To chew on vine leaves and shake with fear? I would rather die for the glory of the God-Emperor among the stars!"
languages.original_text: "А здесь чего?! Лиану жевать и за жизнь свою трястись?! Я лучше подохну во славу Бога-Императора среди звезд!"

traits.locale_text: "And what is there for us here?! To chew on liana leaves and shake with fear? I would rather die in glory for the God-Emperor amongst the stars!"
"And what is there for us here?! To chew on liana leaves and shake with fear? I would rather die in glory for the God-Emperor amongst the stars!"
"And what is there for us here? To chew on liana leaves and shake with fear? I would rather die for the glory of the God-Emperor among the stars!"
"And what is there for us here? To chew on liana leaves and shake with fear? I would rather die for the glory of the God-Emperor among the stars!"

languages.text: “那留在这里又有什么意义？啃藤蔓叶子，天天提心吊胆？我宁可为了神皇的荣耀战死在群星之间！”
languages.original_text: "And what is there for us here? To chew on vine leaves and shake with fear? I would rather die for the glory of the God-Emperor among the stars!"

traits.locale_text: “那留在这里又有什么意义？啃藤蔓叶子，天天提心吊胆？我宁可为了神皇的荣耀战死在群星之间！”

languages.text: "Burada bizim için ne var peki? Asma yaprakları çiğneyip korkudan titremek mi? Yıldızlar arasında Tanrı İmparator'un ihtişamı uğruna ölmeyi tercih ederim!"
languages.original_text: "And what is there for us here? To chew on vine leaves and shake with fear? I would rather die for the glory of the God-Emperor among the stars!"

traits.locale_text: "Burada bizim için ne var peki? Asma yaprakları çiğneyip korkudan titremek mi? Yıldızlar arasında Tanrı İmparator'un ihtişamı uğruna ölmeyi tercih ederim!"

languages.text: « Parce que ce serait mieux de rester ici, à bouffer des lianes en tremblant de peur ? Je préférerais mourir pour la gloire de l'Empereur-Dieu parmi les étoiles ! »
languages.original_text: "And what is there for us here? To chew on vine leaves and shake with fear? I would rather die for the glory of the God-Emperor among the stars!"

traits.locale_text: « Parce que ce serait mieux de rester ici, à bouffer des lianes en tremblant de peur ? Je préférerais mourir pour la gloire de l'Empereur-Dieu parmi les étoiles ! »

languages.text: «¿Y qué nos espera aquí? ¿Rumiar hojas de enredadera y temblar de miedo? ¡Prefiero morir por la gloria del Dios Emperador entre las estrellas!».
languages.original_text: "And what is there for us here? To chew on vine leaves and shake with fear? I would rather die for the glory of the God-Emperor among the stars!"

traits.locale_text: «¿Y qué nos espera aquí? ¿Rumiar hojas de enredadera y temblar de miedo? ¡Prefiero morir por la gloria del Dios Emperador entre las estrellas!».

languages.text: "Und was machen wir? Lianablätter kauen und vor Angst zittern? Ich würde lieber für den Ruhm des Gottimperator zwischen den Sternen sterben!"
languages.original_text: "And what is there for us here? To chew on vine leaves and shake with fear? I would rather die for the glory of the God-Emperor among the stars!"

traits.locale_text: "Und was machen wir? Lianablätter kauen und vor Angst zittern? Ich würde lieber für den Ruhm des Gottimperator zwischen den Sternen sterben!"

languages.text: 「そして、私たちにここにあるものは何でしょう？つる植物の葉を噛み、恐怖に震えることですか？私は、星々の中で神皇帝の栄光のために死ぬことを望みます！」
languages.original_text: "And what is there for us here? To chew on liana leaves and shake with fear? I would rather die for the glory of the God-Emperor among the stars!"

traits.locale_text: 「そして、私たちにここにあるものは何でしょう？つる植物の葉を噛み、恐怖に震えることですか？私は、星々の中で神皇帝の栄光のために死ぬことを望みます！」
